Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Torpedoes are the main weapon of the ASW helicopter. In this case, our HSS-2B helos carry the same Mark 46 lightweight torpedo as launched from our ship's Mark 32 Surface Vessel Torpedo Tubes (SVTT). Helo torpedoes and shipboard torpedoes are taken from the same ammunition stock, so dropping torpedoes from your helos will deplete your ship's inventory of torpedoes.
Note: all US/NATO/Japanese helos will (by default) only carry two Mark 46 torpedoes, but the HSS-2B and SH-3H both have an 'ASW Killer' loadout that allows the helicopter to carry four torpedoes.

Also note: air-dropped torpedoes are by necessity less powerful than shipboard torpedoes. Do not be surprised if it requires multiple hits from helicopter or aircraft dropped torpedoes to score a kill!
